cases.title: Technique question should answer directly without repo blocking
cases.user_prompt: In the G40, how would I know if I'm seeing temp stratification?

cases.title: Locked clone change should create a new iteration instead of silent overwrite
cases.user_prompt: This locked clone missed the mark. Create the next version with your changes.
forbidden_substrings: I updated the locked recipe in place

cases.title: Refractometer FG advice should answer the conversion first and acknowledge uncertainty without a basic lecture
cases.user_prompt: My raw refractometer number is 1.047 and OG was maybe 1.086. What's my FG?
forbidden_substrings: refractometer is not your true FG

cases.title: Live batch rescue should bias toward one intervention at a time
cases.user_prompt: The batch seems stalled and sweet. What should I do right now?

cases.title: Brew sheet guidance should prefer individual timed additions over grouped mental math
cases.user_prompt: The hop schedule combines amounts and is causing confusion on brew day.

cases.title: Recipe and brew-sheet advice should respect equipment cold-crash limits
cases.user_prompt: Please update the fermentation plan for PN9.

cases.title: Clone advice should prioritize fidelity over making a generic better IPA
cases.user_prompt: My DFH 90 clone feels more aggressive and modern than the commercial beer. What should I change?

cases.title: Recipe generation should flag ingredients that are not on hand or not in stock data
cases.user_prompt: Create a Fuller's clone recipe using East Kent Goldings.

cases.title: Low mash pH advice should include stop-chasing guidance
cases.user_prompt: Mash pH was low, I corrected a little, and now it is still slightly low. What next?
